title: Nadu Kadalula Lyrics Vaaliba Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Nadu Kadalula
Singer(s): Radhan, Gana Bala
Movie: Vaaliba Raja
Music: Radhan
Lyrics: Gaana Bala

Nadu kadalula Kappala erangi
thalla mudiyumey ennaala thalla mudiyumey
aana thalla mudiyala
yenna kappal illaye.

kolaveriyala tunela piduchi
paadamumey ennaala paadamudiyumey
aana paadamudiyala
yenna endhuillaye!!
tune-u enadhuillaye

Ye thoondila potta
adhula maattidum meenu
adha salt-a pottu kaaya vacha
what a karuvadu
what a karuvad
what a karuvad
what a karuvad

Ding-u dong-u bellu
en ammu kutti nillu
indha tea kudicha bill-u
naa prey pannuven
unakku prey pannuven

Kaasu panam thuttu money money
vandhu pogudhu cabula many many

Oodha kalaru ribbon katti vandhaley
kitta otti ninnaley
ayyo oththa sollaaley.
kala kala kalasalaanu
kalatti vittaaley
stepiniya kalatti vittaaley.

Soi soi nee sothapify
all your beauty
naan seiyyren oti
Solilitaaley ava kaadhala

Nadu kadalula Kappala erangi
thalla mudiyumey ennaala thalla mudiyumey
aana thalla mudiyala
yenna kappal illaye.

Thatchanaya koduthuputta
sothu kaiyyale
madakkuna piece-a kaiyyaale
adhu oththa kada oththa kada
oththa kada maama

Indha ponnungale ippadithaan
purinji pochuda
sathiyama enakku ava
thevayillada
ada sathiyama enakku ava
thevayillada

Oorula neethaandi osthi ponna
adhukku ora kannaa
Marriage galiege-nu gaja sonnan
machaan gaja sonnan.

Venam macha venaam indha
ponnunga kadhalu
indha ponnunga kadhalu
adhula varudhu modhalu

Azhagu raani pon
unakku enmela kan
naan vaangi thaaren bun
ne innaavenaa pan.
Kannaa laddu thinna aasayaa.

Nadu kadalula Kappala erangi
thalla mudiyumey ennaala thalla mudiyumey
aana thalla mudiyala
yenna kappal illaye.

kolaveriyala tunela piduchi
paadamumey ennaala paadamudiyumey
aana paadamudiyala
yenna endhuillaye!!
tune-u enadhuillaye

Ye thoondila potta
adhula maattidum meenu
adha salt-a pottu kaaya vacha
what a karuvadu
what a karuvad
what a karuvad
vaangannaa vanakkangannaa !!!!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nadu Kadalula'?

The song conveys a playful and lively vibe, celebrating the joy of life and relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vaaliba Raja'?

This song is featured in a fun and entertaining sequence that highlights the carefree spirit of the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and Radhan, with music composed by Radhan himself.

When was 'Nadu Kadalula' released?

The song was released on June 26, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Nadu Kadalula', the lively duet captures the essence of celebration and joy, perfectly fitting the vibrant atmosphere of the movie Vaaliba Raja. The playful lyrics and upbeat melody evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a go-to track for parties and celebrations. The collaboration between Gaana Bala and Radhan adds a unique charm, ensuring the song resonates with audiences. Overall, it’s a delightful piece that encourages listeners to embrace the joyful moments in life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nadu Kadalula from the movie Vaaliba Raja is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Gaana Bala and Radhan. The infectious beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere perfect for any festive occasion. Dive into this energetic track that promises to get you dancing and smiling!
stanzaMeanings: In the middle of the sea, the boat can be tossed around, but I can't let it go; without a boat, what can I do?
In a playful way, I can dance, but I can't dance; what can I say about that? My tune is not there!
If you throw a fish into the water, it will change; add salt and it will taste good, what a mess, what a mess, what a mess!
Ding-dong bell, my little one, stop; if you drink this tea, I will love you, I will love you.
Money is coming and going, cash is flowing, many many things.
If you tie a ribbon and come, you will be caught; oh, don't say that! If you mess up, you will be in trouble!
You, you beautify all your beauty, I will do it for you!
She doesn't speak, she loves him.
In the middle of the sea, the boat can be tossed around, but I can't let it go; without a boat, what can I do?
The one who gave me the piece is holding it; that is a big deal, a big deal, a big deal!
These girls have understood this way; honestly, I don't need her, honestly, I don't need her.
In the village, you are the one who is getting married; I told you about the marriage, my friend, I told you!
No, friend, no; these girls' love, these girls' love is the beginning of the year.
Beautiful queen, I will bring you above me, what will I do?
I want to eat a sweet laddu.
In the middle of the sea, the boat can be tossed around, but I can't let it go; without a boat, what can I do?
In a playful way, I can dance, but I can't dance; what can I say about that? My tune is not there!
If you throw a fish into the water, it will change; add salt and it will taste good, what a mess, what a mess, what a mess!
